purpose: Build and test a larger neighbor carrier induced by admitted traces after neighbor-overdrive boundary.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This does not prove full G900.
This builds a 120-record source-shell/register neighbor carrier, not a 900-state evaluator.
Neighbor-carrier expansion is finite relational exposure, not physical expansion.
No independent witness layer is proven.

interpretation.main_result: A larger 120-record neighbor carrier is supported: admitted traces induce a connected overdrive carrier whose expansion settles back to the admitted residue.
interpretation.why_this_matters: The neighbor-overdrive mechanism is no longer only a column-shell proxy; it can be represented as a path-neighbor carrier.
interpretation.why_not_full_g900: This is still a 120-record source-shell/register carrier, not a full 900-state evaluator with independent witness.
interpretation.next_move: Record the larger neighbor-carrier boundary, then search for an independent witness layer or a 900-state lift.

claim.short_form: A larger 120-record neighbor carrier is supported: admitted traces induce a connected overdrive carrier whose expansion settles back to the admitted residue.
claim.not_closed_reason: This is still a 120-record source-shell/register carrier, not a full 900-state evaluator with independent witness.
claim.next_problem: Record the larger neighbor-carrier boundary, then search for an independent witness layer or a 900-state lift.
